summary: Dynamic Page Builder testing completed successfully. Admin login, Content Builder UI, Drawer forms, Draft/Publish flow, and drag-drop canvas all verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin login working correctly with admin@platform.com / Admin123! credentials
Drawer opens from right side with Layout Page Form and Binding Form sections
Layout form has proper fields: page_type, country, module, category_id
Binding form has category search, tree select dropdown, and action buttons (Aktifi Getir, Bu Page'i Bağla, Binding Kaldır)
Draft Kaydet and Publish buttons are properly enabled/disabled based on draft state
Canvas shows diff summary with Row/Column/Component change counts
Component Library shows draggable items with 'Seçili Sütuna Ekle' buttons
Schema Form Editor renders typed controls (string inputs, dropdowns, etc.) correctly
Drag-drop canvas elements present (row move up/down, component up/down buttons)
seed_data_creation: Test pages created with unique module names during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic Page Builder testing complete. Admin Content Builder UI at /admin/site-design/content-builder is fully functional. Drawer forms work correctly, Draft/Publish flow verified, drag-drop UI elements present. Backend APIs at /api/admin/site/content-layout/* all working.

evidence: Formları Aç button opens Sheet component from right side
Layout Page Form visible with page_type, country, module, category_id fields
Binding Form visible with category search, tree select, and action buttons
Sayfayı Yükle/Oluştur button triggers API to load/create page

ui_tests: Draft Kaydet button enabled when draft exists
Publish button enabled when draft exists
Status message shows 'Sayfa yüklendi. Draft düzenleyebilirsiniz.'

evidence: Component Library items have draggable attribute
Canvas columns have drop zone for drag events
PATCH draft API successfully reorders components
